faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What types of drones and UAVs does AL-SERAJ offer?
faq.a1: We supply a full range of commercial and enterprise drones from leading brands like DJI, including surveying drones, inspection UAVs, and multi-rotor platforms equipped with thermal, multispectral, and LiDAR payloads for security, surveillance, and geospatial applications.
faq.q2: How do your GNSS solutions improve surveying accuracy?
faq.a2: Our GNSS receivers and RTK systems from brands like CHCNAV and South deliver centimeter-level positioning accuracy. They support multi-constellation tracking (GPS, GLONASS, Galileo, BeiDou) for reliable performance in demanding survey, construction, and mapping environments.
faq.q3: What RF security and counter-drone systems do you provide?
faq.a3: We offer advanced radio frequency detection and counter-drone solutions that identify, track, and neutralize unauthorized UAV threats. These systems are used to protect critical infrastructure, government facilities, airports, and high-security zones.
faq.q4: Do you support marine surveying and hydrographic operations?
faq.a4: Yes, we provide professional marine surveying equipment including single and multi-beam echo sounders, unmanned surface vehicles (USVs), and GNSS-aided positioning systems for bathymetric surveys, port inspections, and underwater mapping.
faq.q5: What geospatial and mapping software do you offer?
faq.a5: We distribute industry-leading software including Pix4D for photogrammetry, Agisoft Metashape for 3D modeling, MicroSurvey for CAD processing, and UgCS for drone flight planning — covering the full workflow from data capture to deliverable outputs.
faq.q6: Which industries and sectors do you serve?
faq.a6: We serve government, defense, oil & gas, construction, agriculture, utilities, mining, maritime, and environmental sectors across the Middle East, delivering integrated security and geospatial technology solutions tailored to each industry's unique requirements.

thermal.heroSubtitle: See beyond the visible spectrum with industry-leading thermal cameras that detect, analyze, and protect in any lighting or weather condition.
thermal.overviewText: Our thermal cameras provide layered situational awareness for security, thermography, and commercial vision applications. Using advanced uncooled detectors with NETD less than 40 mK, these cameras see from extended distances under virtually any light or weather condition, distinguishing people and vehicles from other objects with deep learning capabilities.
thermal.feature1Desc: AI-powered intelligent video analytics with precise intrusion detection, accurately distinguishing between human, vehicle, and animal movements to reduce false alarms.
thermal.feature2Desc: Auto Gain Control (AGC) and Digital Detail Enhancement (DDE) work together to deliver balanced brightness and sharper image detail in all conditions.
thermal.feature3Desc: Proven capabilities to work in harsh environments from -40°C to 60°C with intelligent self-protective heating and cooling adjustment.
thermal.feature4Desc: Specially designed to handle up to ±20% voltage fluctuation and 5% packet loss, ensuring reliable operation in unstable power environments.
thermal.feature5Desc: Real-time temperature monitoring and fire detection capabilities with configurable alarm thresholds for early warning systems.
thermal.feature6Desc: Long-range thermal detection from hundreds of meters with multiple focal length options from 4mm to 100mm for various deployment scenarios.
thermal.seriesHeatproDesc: Professional bi-spectrum thermal and optical cameras for perimeter security. Combines thermal detection with visible-light verification in a single unit.
thermal.seriesBiSpectrumDesc: Motorized pan-tilt-zoom cameras with dual thermal and optical sensors. 4MP resolution with up to 328m night vision range for wide-area surveillance.
thermal.seriesThermographyDesc: Precision temperature measurement cameras with range from -20°C to 550°C and ±2°C accuracy. Ideal for industrial monitoring and preventive maintenance.
thermal.useCase1Desc: Protect power plants, water treatment facilities, and government buildings with 24/7 thermal monitoring
thermal.useCase2Desc: Equipment monitoring, preventive maintenance, and process control with precision temperature measurement
thermal.useCase3Desc: Long-range intruder detection along fences, borders, and restricted zones in complete darkness
thermal.useCase4Desc: Surveillance operations, search and rescue missions, and covert monitoring in any conditions
thermal.useCase5Desc: Asset protection for warehouses, retail, and commercial properties with intelligent alerts
thermal.useCase6Desc: Early fire detection for forests, industrial sites, and energy facilities with automatic alarm systems
thermal.ctaText: Contact our team to find the right thermal camera system for your security and monitoring needs.

cyber.heroTitle: Defending Your Digital Infrastructure from Cyber Attacks
cyber.heroSubtitle: A community of security professionals working together to protect organizations from evolving cyber threats with advanced threat intelligence and proactive defense strategies.
cyber.overviewText: AL-SERAJ provides comprehensive cybersecurity threat awareness and mitigation services for organizations of all sizes. We use open source and proprietary intelligence to alert our clients about incoming cyber threats and provide prevention, remediation, and recovery tools and methods to keep your business secure.
cyber.service1Desc: Real-time threat intelligence from government, vendors, and open sources — enriched by our analysts for actionable insights. Receive early warnings from attacks affecting your industry and enhance your threat detection capabilities.
cyber.service2Desc: Pool industry expertise on threat awareness and management. Access secure, private engagement spaces for your cybersecurity teams and share information confidentially with trusted partners.
cyber.service3Desc: Obtain best practices on attacks and intrusions with dedicated analyst support. Access comprehensive training materials, document libraries, and emergency notification systems for rapid incident response.
cyber.benefit1Desc: Receive warnings of cyber threats targeting your industry
cyber.benefit2Desc: Share information and procedures with industry colleagues
cyber.benefit3Desc: Contribute without attribution to protect your reputation
cyber.benefit6Desc: Alerts about systemic or pervasive sector attacks
cyber.benefit7Desc: Special pricing on security technology and training
cyber.benefit9Desc: Threat intelligence from thousands of organizations worldwide
cyber.quoteText: Any company seeking validation that information sharing is important and necessary, need look no further than its reference in the NIST Cybersecurity Framework, which is used by companies globally to identify, assess, and manage cyber risks.
cyber.quoteRole: Former Head of Cyber Intelligence, FBI
cyber.ctaText: Get in touch with our cybersecurity team to discuss how we can protect your digital infrastructure.
